description: This email template is perfect for individuals and organizations involved in activism, community engagement, and the nonprofit sector. Designed to disseminate digital news, it can be used by human resources departments, news agencies, bloggers, and magazine editors. It's an excellent tactic to share newsletters or newspapers in a digital format. The layout allows for easy reading, making it ideal for sharing news and updates with your community or organization. It encourages engagement and interaction, fostering a sense of community and shared purpose. Whether you're updating your team on HR matters, sharing community news, or advocating for a cause, this template will help you communicate effectively and efficiently.
short_description: Engage your community with our platform designed for digital news delivery. Ideal for human resources, nonprofits, and news blogs & magazines, it combines newsletters and newspapers in a modern format. Stay connected, deliver real-time updates and foster a vibrant internal community. Ignite the power of digital storytelling today.

designer.description: Hi! My name is Melissa Hickman. I'm an industrial & organizational psychologist, with several years of digital marketing experience. I focus on UX & aesthetic design. I'm based out of Boulder, Colorado. I love working with eCommerce brands and creating high-converting Shopify stores & email campaigns. Aside from my professional life, I love fitness, nutrition & getting outside with the dogs.
